class.name: AutoworkDoubler
class.description: Core class for the Autowork framework: AutoworkDoubler. Enables native testing, assertions, and mock implementations within Blazium Engine.

method.name: double_scene
method.description: Creates a test double (mock/stub) of a specific resource, scene, or script.

method.name: double_script
method.description: Creates a test double (mock/stub) of a specific resource, scene, or script.
